<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Json; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; use Predis\Command\Traits\Json\NxXxArgument; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/json.set/ * * Set the JSON value at path in key */ class JSONSET extends RedisCommand { use NxXxArgument { setArguments as setSubcommand; } protected static $nxXxArgumentPositionOffset = 3; public function getId() { return 'JSON.SET'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $this->setSubcommand($arguments); $this->filterArguments(); } }
